item.title: 沃尔沃汽车12月至2月销量下滑10%
item.description: 瑞典沃尔沃汽车公司周三表示，今年前三个月（截至2月）共售出156,965辆汽车，较去年同期下降10%，但纯电动汽车销量增长了18%。【原文：Sweden-based Volvo Cars said ‌on Wednesday it sold 156,965 cars in the three months through ​February, down 10% from ​the same period a year ⁠earlier, but sales of fully ​electric cars increased 18%.】

item.title: Belgian museum, US mining company at odds over colonial-era Congo archive
item.description: A U.S. mining company backed by billionaires Jeff Bezos and ​Bill Gates is in a tangle with Belgium's AfricaMuseum over who should digitise antique maps of what is now ‌the Democratic Republic of Congo in the museum's archive.

item.title: Wall Street futures slip on Middle East conflict, oil-driven inflation concerns
item.description: U.S. stock index futures edged lower on Wednesday as investors assessed an ‌escalating Middle East conflict and awaited a fresh slate of economic data for cues on the interest rate outlook, while surging oil prices added to inflation pressures.

item.title: Goldman Sachs raises Q2 Brent oil price forecast by $10 to $76 a barrel
item.description: Goldman Sachs raised on Wednesday its second-quarter 2026 average price forecast for Brent crude ​oil by $10 to $76 per barrel and for WTI by $9 ‌to $71.

item.title: Traton sees better truck sales development in 2026 after last year's drop
item.description: 大众汽车旗下卡车部门特拉顿周三预测，2026年卡车销量将实现增长，销售回报率将与去年基本持平。【原文：Volkswagen's truck unit ​Traton on Wednesday forecast improved unit sales ‌development for 2026, with return on sales broadly on par with last year's number.】

item.title: Bayer projects up to 10.1 bln eur in adj earnings this year
item.description: German pharmaceuticals and crop protection ​group Bayer said ‌on Wednesday it is targeting adjusted earnings of ​up to ​10.1 billion euros ($11.7 billion) this ⁠year, when excluding ​the effect of ​currency swings.

item.title: 意大利金融科技公司Fineco宣布，将在2029年前通过人工智能技术推动新客户增长。
item.description: 意大利数字银行及资产管理公司Fineco周三表示，将通过人工智能技术扩大客户群并削减成本，该战略将持续至2029年，旨在大幅提升新资金的获取速度。【原文：Italian digital bank and money manager ​Fineco said on Wednesday ‌it would use artificial intelligence to expand its client ​base and cut costs ​under a strategy through ⁠2029, aiming to sharply ​grow the pace at ​which it gathers new money.】

item.title: Exclusive: Walmart-backed PhonePe targets up to $10.5 billion valuation in India IPO
item.description: 沃尔玛支持的印度金融科技公司PhonePe——该国使用率最高的支付平台——正计划以90亿至105亿美元估值上市，两位知情人士透露。【原文：Walmart-backed Indian fintech firm PhonePe , the country's most used payments ​platform, is aiming to list at a valuation of between $9 billion and $10.5 billion, two people with direct ‌knowledge of the matter said.】

item.title: 阿迪达斯预计2026年营业利润将升至23亿欧元
item.description: German sportswear maker Adidas on Wednesday ​said it expected its operating profit to ‌increase to around 2.3 billion euros ($2.7 billion) this year, despite around a 400-million-euro impact from U.S. tariffs and ​unfavourable currency developments.

item.title: 大陆集团预测轮胎销售将保持总体稳定，2026年实现盈利
item.description: 德国汽车零部件供应商大陆集团周三表示，在需求持续波动的环境下，其核心轮胎业务2026年的销售额和盈利能力将保持总体稳定。【原文：German car ​parts supplier Continental on Wednesday guided for broadly stable ‌2026 sales and profitability in its core tyres business in a persistently volatile demand environment.】

item.title: 阿迪达斯提名纳赛夫·萨维里斯担任新董事长，并将首席执行官合同延长至2030年
item.description: 阿迪达斯周三宣布，提议由董事会成员纳塞夫·萨维里斯接替托马斯·拉贝担任公司新任董事长。【原文：Adidas is proposing board ‌member Nassef Sawiris as its new chairman, taking over from Thomas Rabe, ​the sportswear company said on ​Wednesday.】

item.title: 焦点：汉莎航空掌门人祭出危机应对方案，应对成本压力与工会斗争
item.description: 在俯瞰法兰克福繁忙国际机场的汉莎航空基地，首席执行官卡斯滕·施波尔凝视着他庞大的航空帝国。巨型屏幕上不断闪烁着航班延误数据及其他运营指标。【原文：At Lufthansa's base overlooking Frankfurt's bustling international airport, chief executive Carsten Spohr has his eye firmly on his sprawling airline empire as giant screens flash flight delay data and other performance indicators in the ​background.】

item.title: 澳大利亚某州计划赋予员工在家办公的法定权利
item.description: 澳大利亚维多利亚州周三宣布，将推出立法赋予员工每周在家办公两天的法定权利。【原文：The Australian state of Victoria said on ​Wednesday it will launch legislation ‌to give employees the legal right to work from home two days ​per week.】

item.title: 德国工会力争在特斯拉柏林工厂实现突破
item.description: 德国最大的工业工会正努力在柏林郊外的特斯拉超级工厂争取更多话语权。该工厂员工正就新一届工人委员会展开投票，此前一场充满恶意攻击和法律挑战的竞选活动已告一段落。【原文：Germany's top industrial union is fighting for more influence at Tesla's gigafactory outside Berlin, where ​staff are voting for a new works council after ‌a campaign marked by mud-slinging and legal challenges.】

item.title: 消息人士称，OpenAI正考虑与北约签订合同
item.description: 知情人士周二透露，OpenAI正考虑与北大西洋公约组织（NATO）签订合同，将其人工智能技术部署在该组织的"非机密"网络中。此前几天，这家ChatGPT母公司刚与五角大楼达成协议。【原文：OpenAI is considering a contract to deploy its AI technology on North Atlantic Treaty ​Organization's (NATO) "unclassified" networks, a person familiar with the matter said on Tuesday, days after the ‌ChatGPT-owner struck a deal with the Pentagon.】

item.title: 早盘竞价：油价冲击担忧加剧，股市再度下挫
item.description: 汤姆·韦斯特布鲁克与韦恩·科尔为您解析欧洲及全球市场今日展望【原文：A look at the day ahead in European and global markets from Tom Westbrook and Wayne Cole】

item.title: 摩根大通称霍尔木兹海峡封锁或迫使伊拉克、科威特数日内削减石油产量
item.description: 摩根大通分析师在一份报告中指出，若霍尔木兹海峡持续关闭，伊拉克和科威特的原油供应可能在数日内开始中断，预计到中东冲突爆发第八天，日产量可能减少330万桶。【原文：Crude oil supplies from Iraq and Kuwait could start shutting in within days if the Strait of ​Hormuz remains closed, potentially cutting 3.3 million barrels ‌per day (bpd) by day eight of the Middle East conflict, J.P. Morgan analysts said in a note.】

item.title: 亚洲股市暴跌加剧，市场为能源冲击做准备
item.description: 亚洲股市周三大幅下挫，投资者抛售芯片制造商股票，担忧中东战争将引发石油冲击，推高通胀并延迟降息。【原文：Asian stocks dropped sharply on Wednesday, with investors dumping positions in chipmakers on concern the war in the Middle East will drive an oil shock that raises inflation and delays interest rate cuts.】

item.title: 马来西亚反贪污委员会正调查政府与芯片公司Arm Holdings的交易
item.description: 马来西亚反贪污委员会周三表示，正就马来西亚政府与英国芯片公司Arm Holdings之间一笔11亿林吉特（约合2.79亿美元）的交易展开调查，该交易涉嫌腐败和欺诈。【原文：Malaysia's anti-graft ​agency said on ‌Wednesday that it is investigating ​corruption and ​fraud allegations involving a ⁠1.1 billion ​ringgit ($279 million) deal between ​the Malaysian government and British chip firm ​Arm Holdings .】

item.title: 彭博社报道，雷森公司股东终止对陷入困境的糖业生产商的救援谈判
item.description: 据彭博社周二报道，巴西糖业和乙醇生产商雷森（Raizen）的重组谈判已告破裂，因其共同所有者科桑（Cosan）和壳牌（Shell）未能就融资方案达成一致。该报道援引知情人士消息称。【原文：Talks to rescue Brazilian sugar and ethanol producer Raizen have fallen ​apart after co-owners Cosan and Shell failed to agree ‌to a plan to raise capital, Bloomberg News reported on Tuesday, citing people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 彭博社报道称，黑石集团40亿美元收购新世界集团的谈判因控制权问题陷入僵局
item.description: 据彭博新闻周三报道，知情人士透露，由于郑家不愿放弃对香港房地产开发商新世界发展的控制权，黑石集团与新世界发展的谈判陷入僵局。【原文：Talks between Blackstone and New World Development have stalled as the ​Cheng family resists giving up control of the Hong ‌Kong property developer, Bloomberg News reported on Wednesday, citing people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 阿里巴巴Qwen AI部门负责人辞职
item.description: 阿里巴巴集团Qwen人工智能模型部门负责人林俊阳周三宣布将卸任该职务——此举发生在该公司发布更新产品两天之后。【原文：The head of Alibaba Group's ​Qwen artificial intelligence model division, ‌Lin Junyang, said on Wednesday that he would be stepping down from ​his role - a move ​that comes two days after the ⁠company released updated products.】

item.title: 高盛离任首席法律顾问鲁姆勒将就与爱泼斯坦关系作证
item.description: 高盛即将离任的首席法律顾问凯瑟琳·鲁姆勒将于周二在美国众议院监督委员会作证，其发言人表示，此前她因与已故性犯罪者杰弗里·爱泼斯坦存在关联而辞职。【原文：Goldman Sachs' departing top lawyer, Kathryn Ruemmler, will testify before the U.S. House Oversight ​Committee, her spokesperson said on Tuesday, ‌after having resigned over links to late sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.】

item.title: 中国2月制造业活动连续第二个月萎缩
item.description: 官方周三公布的数据显示，中国制造业活动在2月份连续第二个月萎缩，表明工厂主仍在努力盈利，因为疲软的国内需求和投资抵消了出口的韧性。【原文：China's manufacturing activity contracted ‌for a second straight month in February, an official survey showed on Wednesday, suggesting factory owners are still struggling to turn a profit as weak domestic demand and investment offset resilient exports.】

item.title: 油价上涨逾1美元，伊朗危机扰乱中东供应
item.description: 周三油价上涨逾1美元，因美以对伊朗的战争扰乱了中东产油国产量，并导致该地区出口中断。【原文：Oil prices rose more than $1 on Wednesday as the U.S.-Israeli war on Iran disrupted Middle East output and halted exports from the region.】

item.title: 中国制造业活动增速创逾五年新高，私营PMI数据显示
item.description: 周三公布的私营部门调查显示，受强劲需求提振制造业信心推动，中国2月份工厂活动扩张速度创2020年12月以来最快。【原文：China's factory activity in February expanded at the fastest pace since ​December 2020, driven by robust demand that helped lift manufacturers' confidence, a private-sector survey showed on Wednesday.】

item.title: 调查显示，中国2月服务业增速创33个月新高
item.description: 中国服务业活动在2月份以33个月来最快的速度扩张，这得益于需求增强，包括海外订单回升，而成本上升则推动产出价格升至21个月高点。一家私营机构周三公布的调查显示。【原文：China's services activity expanded at its fastest pace in 33 months in February, ‌underpinned by firmer demand including a pickup in overseas orders, while rising costs pushed output prices to their highest in 21 months, a private-sector survey showed on Wednesday.】

item.title: 高盛首席执行官称市场可能需要"几周时间"来消化伊朗战争的影响
item.description: 高盛集团首席执行官大卫·所罗门周三表示，他对金融市场对中东冲突的"温和"反应感到惊讶，投资者可能需要"几周时间"才能更充分地消化其影响。【原文：Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon said on Wednesday that he was surprised at ​the "benign" reaction in financial markets over the conflict in the Middle East, ‌and it may take a "couple of weeks" for investors to more fully digest the impacts.】

item.title: 亚洲股市暴跌，市场为能源冲击做准备
item.description: 亚洲股市周三大幅下挫，投资者纷纷减持黄金和芯片制造商的拥挤头寸，因担忧中东战争扩大可能引发能源冲击，从而推高通胀并推迟降息。【原文：Asian markets skidded on Wednesday, with investors cutting crowded positions in gold and chipmakers on worries a wider Mideast war could deliver an energy shock that raises inflation and delays ​rate cuts.】

item.title: 新加坡星展银行获中国债券承销牌照
item.description: 新加坡资产规模最大的银行星展集团周三表示，其中国子公司已获准在中国银行间债券市场从事非金融企业债券的主承销业务。【原文：DBS Group , Singapore's biggest bank by assets, said on Wednesday its China unit ​has been granted a principal underwriting licence for ‌non-financial corporate bonds in China's interbank bond market.】
